member.name: T:BDF.DVDCentral.BL.Models.Customer
member.summary: Represents a customer and provides access to their personal and contact information.
member.remarks: The Customer class encapsulates details such as the customer's name, address, phone number, and associated user identifier. The CustomerFullName property combines the first and last names for convenience. This class is typically used to store and retrieve customer information within the application.

member.name: P:BDF.DVDCentral.BL.Models.Customer.FirstName
member.summary: Gets or sets the first name of the customer.[DisplayName("First Name")]
